tr: Ne zaman stresli hissedersem, yürüyüşe çıkarım.
en: Whenever I feel stressed, I go for a walk. / No matter when I feel stressed, I go for a walk.

tr: Ne zaman canım sıkılsa, annemi ararım.
en: Whenever I get bored, I call my mom. / No matter when I get bored, I call my mom.

tr: Neye karar verirsen ver, seni destekleyeceğim.
en: Whatever decision you make, I will support you. / No matter what decision you make, I will support you.

tr: Ne söylersen söyle, seni dinlemeyeceğim!
en: Whatever you say, I won't listen to you! / No matter what you say, I won't listen to you!

tr: Nereye gidersen git seni izleyeceğim.
en: Wherever you go, I will follow you. / No matter where you go, I will follow you.

tr: Herneyse!
en: Whatever! / No matter what!

tr: Yarışı kim birinci bitirirse ödülü kazanacak.
en: Whoever finishes the race first will win the prize. / No matter who finishes the race first, they will win the prize.

tr: Kim gelirse gelsin, kapıyı açma!
en: Whoever comes, don't open the door! / No matter who comes, don't open the door!

tr: Ne kadar zor olursa olsun, vazgeçme!
en: However hard it gets, don't give up! / No matter how hard it gets, don't give up!

tr: Ne kadar yorgun olursan ol, devam etmelisin.
en: However tired you are, you must keep going. / No matter how tired you are, you must keep going.

tr: Hangi elbiseyi istersen giyebilirsin.
en: You can wear whichever dress you want. / No matter which dress you want, you can wear it.

tr: Ne zaman yağmur yağsa, taksi bulamam.
en: Whenever it rains, I can't find a taxi. / No matter when it rains, I can't find a taxi.

tr: Hangisini seçersen seç, benim için OK.
en: Whichever you choose, it's fine for me. / No matter which one you choose, it's fine for me.

tr: Seni ne zaman görsem mutlu oluyorum.
en: Whenever I see you, I feel happy. / No matter when I see you, I feel happy.

tr: Mutfaktan ne istersen alabilirsin.
en: You can take whatever you want from the kitchen. / No matter what you want, you can take it from the kitchen.

tr: Mutfaktan hangi tabağı istersen alabilirsin.
en: You can take whichever plate you want from the kitchen. / No matter which plate you want, you can take it from the kitchen.

tr: Nereye taşınırsan taşın, beni ara.
en: Wherever you move, call me. / No matter where you move, call me.

tr: Ne kadar geç olursa olsun, bekleyeceğim.
en: However late it gets, I will wait. / No matter how late it gets, I will wait.

tr: Ne yaparsan yap, beni arama.
en: Whatever you do, don't call me. / No matter what you do, don't call me.

tr: Nereye gidersen git seni bulacağım.
en: Wherever you go, I will find you. / No matter where you go, I will find you.

tr: Nereye gidersen git intikamımı alacağım.
en: Wherever you go, I will get my revenge. / No matter where you go, I will get my revenge.

tr: Beni kim ararsa arasın, onlara meşgul olduğumu söyle.
en: Whoever calls me, tell them I'm busy. / No matter who calls me, tell them I'm busy.

tr: Hangisini istersen alabilirsin.
en: You can take whichever one you want. / No matter which one you want, you can take it.

tr: Hangisini istersen bana verebilirsin.
en: You can give me whichever one you want. / No matter which one you want, you can give it to me.

tr: Ne istersen yapacağım.
en: I will do whatever you want. / No matter what you want, I will do it.

tr: Ne olursa olsun, sakin ol.
en: Whatever happens, stay calm. / No matter what happens, stay calm.

tr: Ne zaman yardıma ihtiyacın olursa beni ara.
en: Whenever you need help, call me. / No matter when you need help, call me.

tr: Ayşe nerede çalışırsa çalışsın, patronları onu sever.
en: Wherever Ayşe works, her bosses love her. / No matter where Ayşe works, her bosses love her.

tr: Ne kadar hızlı koşarsan koş, beni geçemezsin.
en: However fast you run, you can't pass me. / No matter how fast you run, you can't pass me.

tr: Bunun yanlış olduğunu sana her kim söyledi!
en: Whoever told you this was wrong! / No matter who told you this, it was wrong!

tr: Hangi filmi izlersek izleyelim, iyi vakit geçireceğiz.
en: Whichever film we watch, we'll have a great time. / No matter which film we watch, we'll have a great time.

tr: Annem ne yemek pişirirse pişirsin, lezzetlidir.
en: Whatever my mom cooks, it is always delicious. / No matter what my mom cooks, it is always delicious.

tr: Ne olursa olsun, pes etmeyeceğim.
en: Whatever happens, I won't give up. / No matter what happens, I won't give up.

tr: Anneannemi ne zaman ziyaret etsem, benim için köfte yapar.
en: Whenever I visit my grandmother, she makes meatballs for me. / No matter when I visit my grandmother, she makes meatballs for me.

tr: Bu kitabı her görüşümde seni hatırlıyorum.
en: Whenever I see this book, I remember you. / No matter when I see this book, I remember you.

tr: Ne zaman hazırsan, hazırım.
en: Whenever you're ready, I'm ready. / No matter when you're ready, I'm ready.

tr: Kim bize katılmak istiyorsa bizimle gelebilir.
en: Whoever wants to join us can come with us. / No matter who wants to join us, they can come with us.

tr: Kim onlarla gitmek istiyorsa, gidebilir.
en: Whoever wants to go with them can go. / No matter who wants to go with them, they can go.

tr: Kim bu arabayı sana sattıysa ona gitmelisin.
en: You must go to whoever sold you this car. / No matter who sold you this car, you must go to them.

tr: Söylediğin her şey doğru.
en: Whatever you say is true. / No matter what you say, it is true.

tr: Ne söylüyorsam doğru.
en: Whatever I say is true. / No matter what I say, it is true.

tr: Hangisini tercih edersen onu al.
en: Take whichever one you prefer. / No matter which one you prefer, take it.

tr: Biz her seyahat edişimizde bol bol fotoğraf çekeriz.
en: Whenever we travel, we take a lot of photos. / No matter when we travel, we take a lot of photos.

tr: Bu pencereyi her kim kırdıysa özür dilemeli.
en: Whoever broke this window must apologize. / No matter who broke this window, they must apologize.

tr: Hava ne kadar soğuk olursa olsun, Ali her gün yüzer.
en: However cold the weather is, Ali swims every day. / No matter how cold the weather is, Ali swims every day.

tr: Ne dersen de, fikrim değişmeyecek.
en: Whatever you say, my mind won't change. / No matter what you say, my mind won't change.

tr: Sen ne zaman gülümsersen, ben mutlu bir insanım.
en: Whenever you smile, I am a happy person. / No matter when you smile, I am a happy person.

tr: Nerede yaşarsan yaşa, kendini sev.
en: Wherever you live, love yourself. / No matter where you live, love yourself.

tr: Kim kazanırsa kazansın kutlama yapacağız.
en: Whoever wins, we will celebrate. / No matter who wins, we will celebrate.

tr: Ne zaman müzik dinlesem, rahatlıyorum.
en: Whenever I listen to music, I relax. / No matter when I listen to music, I relax.

tr: Nereye giderse gitsin, köpeği onu takip eder.
en: Wherever he goes, his dog follows him. / No matter where he goes, his dog follows him.

tr: Kimin yardıma ihtiyacı varsa beni mail atabilir.
en: Whoever needs help can email me. / No matter who needs help, they can email me.

tr: Hangisini alırsan al, bu dükkandaki her şey çok ucuz.
en: Whichever you buy, everything in this shop is very cheap. / No matter which one you buy, everything in this shop is very cheap.

tr: Onlar ne zaman tartışsa, çocukları ağlıyor.
en: Whenever they argue, their child cries. / No matter when they argue, their child cries.

tr: Nereye gidersen git seni destekleyeceğim.
en: Wherever you go, I will support you. / No matter where you go, I will support you.

tr: Nerede olursan ol seni destekleyeceğim.
en: Wherever you are, I will support you. / No matter where you are, I will support you.

tr: Her kim doğru cevap verirse, bir hediye kazanacak.
en: Whoever gives the correct answer will win a gift. / No matter who gives the correct answer, they will win a gift.

tr: Ne kadar zengin olursan ol, mutlu olmayacaksın.
en: However rich you become, you won't be happy. / No matter how rich you become, you won't be happy.

tr: Neye inanırsan inan, diğerlerine saygı göstermelisin.
en: Whatever you believe in, you must respect others. / No matter what you believe in, you must respect others.

tr: Hangi takım kazanırsa kazansın, onları alkışlamalıyız.
en: Whichever team wins, we must applaud them. / No matter which team wins, we must applaud them.

tr: Ne zaman egzersiz yapsam daha iyi hissediyorum.
en: Whenever I exercise, I feel better. / No matter when I exercise, I feel better.

tr: Hangisini seçersen seç pişman olmayacaksın.
en: Whichever you choose, you won't regret it. / No matter which one you choose, you won't regret it.

tr: Ne duyarsan duy, panik olma!
en: Whatever you hear, don't panic! / No matter what you hear, don't panic!

tr: Ne söylersen yapacaksın!
en: Whatever you say, you will do it! / No matter what you say, you will do it!

tr: Ne söylerlerse yapacağız!
en: Whatever they say, we will do it! / No matter what they say, we will do it!

tr: Ne zaman seyahat etsen, yeni yemekler denersin.
en: Whenever you travel, you try new foods. / No matter when you travel, you try new foods.

tr: Nereye park edersen et, arabanı kilitle.
en: Wherever you park, lock your car. / No matter where you park, lock your car.

tr: Bu pastayı her kim yaptıysa, iyi iş çıkardı.
en: Whoever made this cake did a great job. / No matter who made this cake, they did a great job.

tr: Ne kadar yorgun hissedersen hisset, bu ödevi bitirmelisin.
en: However tired you feel, you must finish this homework. / No matter how tired you feel, you must finish this homework.

tr: Ne olursa olsun seninleyim.
en: Whatever happens, I am with you. / No matter what happens, I am with you.

tr: Ne zaman onlarla buluşsak, çok güleriz.
en: Whenever we meet with them, we laugh a lot. / No matter when we meet with them, we laugh a lot.

tr: Ne zaman yağmur yağsa trafik artıyor.
en: Whenever it rains, the traffic gets worse. / No matter when it rains, the traffic gets worse.

tr: Nereye oturursan otur, sahneyi görebilirsin.
en: Wherever you sit, you can see the stage. / No matter where you sit, you can see the stage.

tr: İlk kim ararsa, ödülü kazanır.
en: Whoever calls first wins the prize. / No matter who calls first, they win the prize.

tr: Kitabı ilk kim bitirirse, bizimle gelecek.
en: Whoever finishes the book first will come with us. / No matter who finishes the book first, they will come with us.

tr: Ne kadar korkutucu görünürse görünsün, denemelisin.
en: However scary it looks, you should try it. / No matter how scary it looks, you should try it.

tr: Hangisini beğenirsen onu satın al.
en: Buy whichever one you like. / No matter which one you like, buy it.

tr: Bu şarkıyı ne zaman duysam annemi hatırlarım.
en: Whenever I hear this song, I remember my mom. / No matter when I hear this song, I remember my mom.

tr: Nereye gidersen git dikkatli sür.
en: Wherever you go, drive carefully. / No matter where you go, drive carefully.

tr: Bana her kim yardım ederse ona çok para vereceğim.
en: Whoever helps me, I will give them a lot of money. / No matter who helps me, I will give them a lot of money.

tr: Yarın ne olursa olsun, güçlü kalmalısın.
en: Whatever happens tomorrow, you must stay strong. / No matter what happens tomorrow, you must stay strong.

tr: Ben onu ne zaman arasam, o meşgul.
en: Whenever I call him, he is busy. / No matter when I call him, he is busy.

tr: Hangisini istersen seçebilirsin.
en: You can choose whichever one you want. / No matter which one you want, you can choose it.

tr: Neye ihtiyacın varsa benden isteyebilirsin.
en: You can ask me for whatever you need. / No matter what you need, you can ask me for it.

tr: Bunu her kim söylediyse, yalan söylemiş.
en: Whoever said this was lying. / No matter who said this, they were lying.

tr: Her kim benim paramı çaldıysa, bana geri vermeli.
en: Whoever stole my money must give it back. / No matter who stole my money, they must give it back.

tr: Ne olursa olsun umutlu kal.
en: Whatever happens, stay hopeful. / No matter what happens, stay hopeful.

tr: Ne zaman hazırsan başlayabiliriz.
en: Whenever you're ready, we can start. / No matter when you're ready, we can start.
